title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Wipro Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Wipro Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wipro Capital India has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!
